_doc: C2M2 compound CV term table -> one schema.org DefinedTerm per row. See mappings/cv/disease.json for the shared shape. The 'id' column is a bare PubChem Compound CID or GlyTouCan accession (resolved via the compound source_table). No 'usedBy' back-reference: compounds are cited only via substance.compound and collection_compound, neither of which is an exploded @graph entity, so there is no node to point back at.

fields.template: C2M2 compound controlled-vocabulary term {curie}{onto_suffix}, referenced by the {dcc_label} instance.
